# AME Bazaar (Apparel Maheshwari Enterprises)

> A family-owned premium retail clothing store located on Mubarakpur Road, Kirari, Delhi. Rated 4.8+ Stars on Google.

## Key Information
- **Street Address:** Mubarakpur Road, Kirari, Delhi - 110086, India
- **Opening Hours:** Daily 09:00 AM – 10:00 PM (09:00 - 22:00)
- **Price Range:** ₹100 – ₹1000
- **Areas Served:** Kirari, Mubarakpur, Meer Vihar, Baljit Vihar, Prem Nagar, Nangloi, Budh Vihar, Rohini.
- **Contact phone:** +91 99999 99999
- **Email:** contact@amebazaar.com
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.google.com/?q=AME+Bazaar+Kirari+Delhi
- **Socials:** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/amebazaar), Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/amebazaar)

## Website Structure & Crawling
- **Homepage:** http://localhost/ - Highlights hero collections, category grid, reviews, and FAQ.
- **Blog Archive:** http://localhost/blog/ - Knowledge Engine containing articles about local fashion, fabrics, and custom alteration care.
- **Categories:**
  - Men's Wear (Apparel and ethnic coordinates)
  - Women's Wear (Sarees and designer coordinates)
  - Kids Wear (Skin-friendly cottons)
  - Accessories (Belts, wallets, bags)
- **Services:** In-store tailoring and custom garment alterations.
